changeSet.author: healthdata-system
changeSet.comment: Drop materialized view before altering patient_id columns to UUID
changeSet.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS mv_patient_health_dashboard CASCADE; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS refresh_patient_health_dashboard();

changeSet.author: healthdata-system
changeSet.comment: Convert quality-measure service patient_id columns to UUID for consistent identifiers

changeSet.author: healthdata-system
changeSet.comment: Recreate materialized view with UUID-typed patient_id

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS mv_patient_health_dashboard CASCADE;

changeSet.author: healthdata-system
changeSet.comment: Recreate function to refresh materialized view
